{{Infobox concept
| name = Overlord revelation
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Overlord]] revelation is a specific type of spiritual insight used to reach the [[Overlord]] stage of advancement. Unlike an [[Underlord revelation]], which focuses on a person's initial motivations, the [[Overlord]] revelation defines who an individual has become in their current state. It serves as a method for a person to recognize and refocus their identity, providing a new understanding of how they relate to the world rather than summarizing their entire being. Achieving this insight is difficult, as many fail due to insufficient talent, resources, or foundational strength; however, those who successfully discover an [[Underlord revelation]] are often capable of attaining the [[Overlord]] insight as well. The revelation can manifest in various ways, such as through [[soulfire]] that refines and strengthens the individual or through specific internal realizations. Examples of these revelations include declarations of personal identity, such as distinguishing oneself from another entity, or realizing one's relationship to others. The successful attainment of this revelation is a prerequisite for further advancement to higher stages, such as [[Archlord]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is hunting for her [[Overlord revelation]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is seeking his [[Overlord revelation]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Overlord revelation]] is a way to recognize and refocus who you are.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Overlord revelation]] is about who you are now.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] helped [[Mercy]] with her [[Overlord revelation]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] possesses an [[Overlord revelation]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s [[Overlord revelation]] was that she was not the [[Sword Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
